description: Byte-preserve with cache_control on the system block. Exercises the cache-client-origin path: any cache hit observed on this route MUST be attributed origin='client' per Constitution §5.3, because tokenpak did not place the breakpoint — Claude Code itself did.

test_env_preconditions.reason: Classifier's _claude_code_mode parses explicit entrypoint values cron/cli/sdk/ide/tmux from header OR env; 'tui' is not in that list and instead defaults via body-hint (stream:true → TUI). SC-06 fixtures must scrub this env var before running TUI scenarios.
